title: Senior Teacher - LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
company: LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Senior Teacher based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners:
LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners!
